stemHtml: How can a pilot perceive the depth of a image at a distance of 200 m or more?

options.a: The changing of the shape of the lens of the eye, to achieve the final focusing onto the retina.
options.b: Overlap of contours,  obscuration, and atmospheric perspective.
options.c: Objects at close range provide a different picture on each retina than distant objects.
options.d: The slightly different view each eye has of an object.
